# delegate()

**Instance Method**

Retrieves the composition picker view delegate.

## Declaration

```swift
func delegate() -> Any!
```

## Return Value

The delegate.

## Setting and Retrieving the View Delegate

- **setDelegate(_:)**: Sets the composition picker view delegate.
